title: CurriculumRegistry
description: Ordered list of topics defining the course curriculum. Each entry corresponds to exactly one topic Markdown file and one quiz JSON file.

slug.description: Primary key. Must match: the wiki term file at src/content/wiki/terms/{letter}/{slug}.md, the quiz file at src/content/quizzes/{slug}.json, and the slug field in each file's frontmatter / root object.

title.description: Display title for the curriculum index. Should match the topic frontmatter title.

examWeightPct.description: Approximate exam weight from the PSI CIB. Values are estimates; they need not sum to exactly 100.

order.description: 1-based display order in the curriculum index. Values must be unique across all entries.

estimatedMinutes.description: Estimated total study time in minutes for the lesson + quiz pass.
